title: Muscle Gain – Non-Vegetarian
plateMethod: Eat balanced meals with adequate protein: aim for ~1.6–2 g protein per kg from chicken, fish, eggs, dairy, or plant-based options. Include complex carbs and healthy fats. Spread intake across 3–4 meals.
hydration: Drink 2.5–3 L of water daily. Have water with meals and during training.
sampleMeals: Breakfast: Oatmeal with banana, nuts, and Greek yogurt; or eggs with toast and avocado.
Lunch: Grilled chicken or fish with rice, vegetables, and a side of yogurt or legumes.
Dinner: Chicken stir-fry or fish with vegetables and quinoa; or lean meat with sweet potato and salad.
Post-workout: Greek yogurt with fruit; or chicken and rice.
Snacks: Nuts, cheese, hummus with veggies, or a peanut butter sandwich.
disclaimer: General guidance only; consult a healthcare or nutrition professional for personalized advice.
